hooks.command: b=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo main); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PROGRESS LOG REMINDER (visionpipe-web): branch is %s. Per CLAUDE.md, every commit must be accompanied by a new entry prepended to prd/%s.md. If this commit already included that update, explicitly tell the user you updated the progress log alongside the commit. If you forgot, write the entry now and create a NEW follow-up commit (do not amend)."}}' "$b" "$b"
